summary: LEAMSS Immigration Portal MongoDB migration testing completed. All 45 backend API tests pass (100%). All 4 user roles (Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client) login and access dashboards successfully. Fixed missing backend endpoints (/api/stats/dashboard, /api/sales/pending, /api/sales/my-sales, /api/tickets/all, /api/tickets/stats, /api/quick-actions, /api/scheduler/expiring-documents) that were causing frontend 404 errors.

minor.issue: SSE endpoint not implemented - frontend shows connection error but app works

categories.authentication: 5/5 passed - All 4 roles login + invalid login rejected
categories.admin_dashboard: 5/5 passed - Stats, all sales, filtered sales, cases, users
categories.products_crud: 4/4 passed - Get, create, update, delete products
categories.sales: 3/3 passed - Bank transfer, online payment, approval with credentials
categories.case_manager: 3/3 passed - My cases, stats, workflow step update
categories.documents: 2/2 passed - Upload and get case documents
categories.analytics: 4/4 passed - Sales trend, by status, top products, top partners
categories.partner_commissions: 3/3 passed - Dashboard stats, partner report, commissions report
categories.impersonation: 2/2 passed - Admin can impersonate, non-admin denied

frontend_tests.login_page: PASSED - Loads correctly with demo credentials displayed
frontend_tests.admin_dashboard: PASSED - Stats (3 Pending Sales, 3 Active Cases, $260,000 Revenue, 2 Open Tickets)
frontend_tests.admin_sales_tab: PASSED - Shows sales with filter tabs (All/Pending/Approved/Rejected)
frontend_tests.admin_activity_log: PASSED - Shows activity data with user actions
frontend_tests.case_manager_dashboard: PASSED - Stats (My Cases: 2, Pending Review: 1, Documents: 1)
frontend_tests.client_dashboard: PASSED - Case progress with workflow steps visible

features_verified: Admin login - admin@leamss.com / Admin@123 - VERIFIED
Admin dashboard stats load correctly - VERIFIED
Admin can view all sales with status filter - VERIFIED
Admin can approve a sale - returns client credentials - VERIFIED (API)
Admin can assign case manager to case - VERIFIED
Admin can create/update/delete products and workflow steps - VERIFIED
Admin Activity Log shows real audit data - VERIFIED
Admin can impersonate/switch to other users - VERIFIED
Partner login - partner@leamss.com / Partner@123 - VERIFIED
Partner can create sale with online payment method - VERIFIED
Partner can create sale with bank_transfer payment method - VERIFIED
Partner dashboard shows sales and commission data - VERIFIED
Case Manager login - manager@leamss.com / Manager@123 - VERIFIED
Case Manager My Cases shows correct count and case details - VERIFIED
Case Manager can update workflow step status - VERIFIED
Case Manager can save and retrieve information sheet - VERIFIED
Case Manager can request additional documents - VERIFIED
Client login - client@leamss.com / Client@123 - VERIFIED
Client dashboard loads with case and document info - VERIFIED
Document upload and download work correctly - VERIFIED
Global search returns results - VERIFIED
Partner commission report works - VERIFIED
Tickets CRUD works - VERIFIED
Notifications endpoint works - VERIFIED
Settings endpoint works - VERIFIED
Analytics endpoints work (sales-trend, sales-by-status, top-products, top-partners) - VERIFIED
action_items: OPTIONAL: Implement SSE notifications endpoint (/api/sse/notifications) for real-time updates - currently shows console error but app works fine without it
seed_data_creation: Test sales created with 'online' and 'bank_transfer' payment methods during testing. Test products and tickets also created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: LEAMSS Immigration Portal fully migrated from MySQL to MongoDB. All 45 backend tests pass. All 4 role dashboards working correctly. Backend auto-seeds on startup if database is empty. Added missing endpoints for frontend compatibility: /api/stats/dashboard, /api/sales/pending, /api/sales/my-sales, /api/tickets/all, /api/tickets/stats, /api/quick-actions, /api/scheduler/expiring-documents. SSE notifications endpoint not implemented but app works without it. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_mongodb_backend.py
